data.title: Janet Yellen Keeps Fed Cut Hopes Alive As Iran War Roils Markets— 'If I Had To Write One Thing Down...'
data.description: During the HSBC Global Investment Summit in Hong Kong, former U.S. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen expressed uncertainty about a potential Federal Reserve rate cut later this year. Yellen acknowledged the impact of the Iran war on oil-driven inflation, complicating the central bank's decisions. Despite rising inflation expectations, Yellen mentioned that there remains a possibility for a rate cut. She described the Iran conflict as creating a widespread supply shock affecting various sectors such as gasoline, LNG, fertilizers, food, and shipping costs. Yellen's insights suggest a cautious approach by the Fed, considering the ongoing economic challenges. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ponce Financial Group, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Ponce Financial Group, Inc. revealed its first quarter results for 2026. The company, listed as "PDLB" on Nasdaq, operates as the holding company for Ponce Bank, National Association. It shared this information with the public via a press release.

data.title: XRP's 8-Year Wait For New Highs To End In 2026? Here's What The Crypto Prediction Market Is Saying
data.description: Investors in the cryptocurrency market are losing confidence in XRP's (CRYPTO: XRP) ability to reach new highs in 2026. Currently, there is only a 13% probability, according to Polymarket, a Polygon-based platform, that XRP will surpass its all-time high of $3.84, achieved over eight years ago, by the end of December. This is a significant drop from the 41% odds assigned at the beginning of the year. Likewise, the likelihood of XRP hitting all-time highs by September 30 has plummeted to 12% from 35% earlier this year. The total amount wagered on this outcome is close to $250,000. The market outcome will be resolved as "Yes" if any XRP/USDT 1-minute candle on Binance reaches a final price... (Continued on Benzinga.com)

data.title: Avis Brings Back The Short Squeeze — Navitas, Beyond Meat Join In
data.description: In April 2026, meme stock frenzy continues with Avis Budget Group (NASDAQ: CAR) taking the lead. CAR stock has surged 500% in recent weeks, reaching $665 on Tuesday, marking a 9.23% increase. Short interest near 100% prompted Barclays to downgrade CAR to Sell, yet the momentum remains strong. Short interest was at 54% of free float in late March, intensifying market dynamics. Pentwater Capital's stake disclosure and options gamma dynamics have fueled the rally, forcing market makers to buy shares and drive prices even higher. The situation has left short sellers facing significant losses amid the soaring stock price.

data.title: US Soldier Charged For Allegedly Using Sensitive Intel To Net $400,000 On Polymarket Bet Linked To Nicolás Maduro's Capture
data.description: An Army soldier, Gannon Ken Van Dyke, has been charged by the Justice Department for exploiting classified information regarding a mission to capture Venezuela's former leader, Nicolás Maduro. Van Dyke, who played a role in planning and executing the military operation, had access to sensitive details. He allegedly wagered $33,034 on Polymarket, consistently betting on events related to Venezuela, such as the U.S. invasion and Maduro's removal. Prior to Trump's announcement confirming Maduro's capture on Jan. 3, Van Dyke profited $409,81 by winning all his bets on the Polygon-based prediction market. This breach of trust has led to accusations that Van Dyke betrayed his fellow soldiers by misusing classified information.

data.title: Oruka Therapeutics to Host Conference Call to Report Week 16 Data for ORKA-001 from the Ongoing EVERLAST-A Trial on April 27, 2026
data.description: Oruka Therapeutics, Inc., a biotechnology company based in Menlo Park, California, is set to release the Week 16 data for ORKA-001 from the EVERLAST-A Phase 2a trial targeting moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis on April 27, 2026. The company, listed as ORKA on Nasdaq, is focused on developing innovative biologics for chronic skin diseases. To discuss the results, Oruka will hold a conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET following the data announcement.

data.title: NASDAQ: SRAD Investigation Alert: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Encourages Sportradar Group AG (NASDAQ: SRAD) Investors to Contact the Firm
data.description: A law firm, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP, based in RADNOR, Pa., is currently looking into potential breaches of federal securities laws by Sportradar Group AG (Sportradar) (NASDAQ: SRAD). The investigation is being conducted on behalf of individuals possibly affected. The news was released on April 26, 2026. For more information, visit the law firm's website at www.ktmc.com.

data.title: Senator Tillis ready to support Kevin Warsh after U.S. ends Fed inquiry. Key committee vote imminent.
data.description: Senator Thom Tillis stated that he was provided with reassurances by federal prosecutors, alleviating his worries and paving the way for a crucial committee vote on Kevin Warsh.

data.title: 1 out of 3 crypto traders are reducing daily expenses amid market conditions; over 33% in the US delay major purchases due to losses.
data.description: Approximately 33% of cryptocurrency traders in the United States reveal that they have reduced their daily expenses and postponed significant purchases due to unrealized losses impacting their household finances.

data.title: Senator Tillis ready to move forward with Fed nominee Kevin Warsh after probe dropped, following assurances from prosecutors. Key committee vote imminent.
data.description: Senator Thom Tillis has stated that he received assurances from federal prosecutors, which alleviated his worries and paved the way for a crucial committee vote on Kevin Warsh. This development comes amidst growing anticipation, as the vote will play a significant role in determining Warsh's future.

data.title: Safety. For Family: TIGGO9 Completes Public Three-Vehicle Composite Crash Verification During the 2026 International Business Summit
data.description: In April 2026, in Wuhu, China, at the 2026 International Business Summit, CHERY conducted a public validation of the TIGGO9's crash safety at the Chery Crash Safety Laboratory. The demonstration involved three vehicles and was witnessed by global dealers, international media, and other attendees. This event showcased Chery's commitment to safety, with the TIGGO9 proving its durability and protection features in a high-stakes simulation. The impressive results of the test underscored Chery's dedication to producing secure and reliable vehicles, leaving a lasting impression on the audience.

data.title: Innovation in health begins by creating the right conditions
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia, on April 26, 2026, FIFARMA emphasized the importance of fostering innovation in health on World Intellectual Property Day. The Latin American Federation of the Pharmaceutical Industry stressed that creating the proper environment is crucial for advancing healthcare innovation.

data.title: JisuLife's Pro 1 Mini Handheld Fan Launch Debut - where style meets sensorial
data.description: On April 26, 2026, in Los Angeles, JisuLife unveiled its latest product, the Pro 1 Mini fan. Named the top Portable Fan brand globally by Euromonitor, JisuLife's new fan is now on sale for $69.99 USD at select Target stores and on their website, JisuLife.com. For more information and detailed images, visit the provided link.
